# Generated by exon. Do not edit manually.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPERIMENTAL_CXX_IMPORT_STD "451f2fe2-a8a2-47c3-bc32-94786d8fc91b")
set(CMAKE_CXX_MODULE_STD ON)
project(greeting LANGUAGES CXX)

if(MSVC)
    add_compile_options(/W4 /wd4996 /utf-8)
    add_compile_definitions(_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)
endif()

if(NOT DEFINED EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS)
    set(EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS ON)
endif()

if(NOT TARGET foundation)
    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../foundation ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/_deps/foundation-build)
endif()

if(TARGET greeting)
    return()
endif()

add_library(greeting-modules)
target_sources(greeting-modules
    PUBLIC FILE_SET CXX_MODULES BASE_DIRS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/greeting.cppm
)
target_link_libraries(greeting-modules PUBLIC
    foundation
)

add_library(greeting ALIAS greeting-modules)

set_source_files_properties(
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/greeting.cppm
    PROPERTIES COMPILE_DEFINITIONS
    "EXON_PKG_NAME=\"greeting\";EXON_PKG_VERSION=\"0.1.0\""
)

if(PROJECT_IS_TOP_LEVEL)

    target_compile_options(greeting-modules PRIVATE
        -Wall
        -Wextra
        $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-DWORKSPACE_PROFILE_DEBUG=1>
        $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-DWORKSPACE_PROFILE_RELEASE=1>
    )
endif()
